nodes.name: adbc_snowflake.rs
nodes.summary: Schema extraction handler for ADBC Snowflake sources, fetching column definitions via Arrow schema from the Snowflake connector.

nodes.name: avro.rs
nodes.summary: Schema extraction handler for Avro sources including both standard Avro and Debezium-wrapped schemas, supporting schema registry lookups.

nodes.name: debezium.rs
nodes.summary: Schema extraction handler for Debezium Avro sources, extracting primary key column names from the Debezium message schema.

nodes.name: iceberg.rs
nodes.summary: Schema extraction handler for Iceberg table sources, reading the current schema from the Iceberg catalog and mapping to RisingWave column types.

nodes.name: json.rs
nodes.summary: Schema extraction handler for JSON sources, supporting both schema registry and URL-based JSON Schema lookups.

nodes.name: nexmark.rs
nodes.summary: Schema extraction handler for Nexmark benchmark event sources, providing well-known column definitions for Auction, Bid, and Person events.

nodes.name: protobuf.rs
nodes.summary: Schema extraction handler for Protobuf sources, loading descriptor from schema registry or URL and mapping message fields to columns.

nodes.name: validate.rs
nodes.summary: Validation logic for CREATE SOURCE statements, checking connector properties, format compatibility, and schema completeness.

nodes.name: gen-demo-insert-data.py
nodes.summary: Python script generating demo INSERT SQL statements for testing the Java binding data chunk payload format.

nodes.name: data-chunk-payload-convert-generator.rs
nodes.summary: Binary tool for generating data chunk payload conversion test data used to validate Java binding serialization.

nodes.name: data-chunk-payload-generator.rs
nodes.summary: Binary tool for generating binary data chunk payloads to test Java binding deserialization of RisingWave row batches.

nodes.name: hummock_iterator.rs
nodes.summary: Hummock storage iterator implementation for the Java binding layer, providing JNI-compatible key-value scan operations.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Library root for the Java binding crate, exposing JNI functions for data chunk and Hummock iteration from Java.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_jni_core crate providing core JNI utilities and type mapping between Rust and Java.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_meta crate implementing the meta service for cluster metadata and coordination.

nodes.name: build.rs
nodes.summary: Cargo build script for the meta dashboard crate, optionally bundling the dashboard frontend assets at compile time.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the meta dashboard crate serving the RisingWave web management UI from the meta service.

nodes.name: serve.rs
nodes.summary: Example binary for serving the meta service dashboard UI locally for development and testing.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_meta_model crate defining SeaORM entity models for meta service persistence.

nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: Entry point for SeaORM database migration runner for the meta service schema.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the meta model crate explaining the SeaORM entity structure and how to add new model entities.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_meta_node crate containing the meta service node startup and server implementation.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Meta node library root that initializes all meta service subsystems including catalog, stream manager, barrier manager, and starts the gRPC server.

nodes.name: server.rs
nodes.summary: Meta service gRPC server setup registering all service handlers, configuring middleware, and managing the server lifecycle.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief overview of the meta service crate structure and its role as the coordination and metadata storage layer.

nodes.name: extract_adbc_snowflake_columns
nodes.summary: Connects to Snowflake via ADBC, retrieves the Arrow schema, and maps fields to RisingWave ColumnCatalog entries.

nodes.name: extract_avro_table_schema
nodes.summary: Extracts table schema columns from Avro or Debezium-Avro sources using schema registry or file-based descriptors.

nodes.name: extract_iceberg_columns
nodes.summary: Loads an Iceberg table from the catalog and maps its current schema fields to RisingWave ColumnCatalog entries.

nodes.name: extract_json_table_schema
nodes.summary: Extracts table schema columns from a JSON Schema source using schema registry or URL-based schema fetching.
